overview: Grok Code Fast 1 is a large language model from xAI (Grok), part of the Grok Code line. Released 2025-08-28. Coding-specialised models tuned for fast, agentic software development.
What's notable in this version: First dedicated agentic coding model (codename 'sonic'); 256K context, high throughput, low cost. Deprecated May 15, 2026 (retires Aug 15, 2026).
